id: people who practice English every day
naturalChunk: people who practice English every day
avoidSaying: people who practices English every day
sentencePatterns: People who ... are more likely to ...
realLifeExamples: People who practice English every day improve faster.
usageNotes: Use people who practice, not people who practices. Use every day as two words when it means each day.
productionPrompts: 用 People who ... improve faster. 写一句关于英语练习习惯的英文。
